features: 【Wig Care Recommendation】When the wig is used daily, it is best to washit at least once every twa weeks. When wig feeis sticky, dry or lost volume and curis wash the wig with Wig Shampoo.

【Synthetic & Human Wig Shampoo】Our human hair wig shampoo provides moisture to your wig to keep out from dryness. Also it delivers freshness feeling by using less fragrance in our product. Human hair wig shampoo contains Tea tree extract, coconut oil for keep your wig healthy and shine. Additionally, high effect in reducing damaging the wig. It is an excellent wig shampoo that keeps promoting your wig volume, silkiness and shine.

【2 in 1 Shampoo & Conditioner for Wig】immetee Wig Shampoo for Poly Wigs, Lace Wigs and Hair Systems. This daily shampoo washes away styling products and protects your colour without drying out your hair.

【Wig Regular treatment】Regular treatment with wig care products, the second hairstyle, hairpiece or hair system does not lose its shape and retains its silky shine and natural hold for a long time. This guarantees highly effective yet mild, fibre-friendly ingredients that are optimally matched to each other. Vitamins protect against harmful environmental influences, so that the elasticity and elasticity are retained for a long time.

【Direction to Use】Before wash, gently remove tangles. Shake shampoo bottle well. Immerse the wig in cool water and pour 2 capfuls of Shampoo. Then mix and soak for 5-10 minutes. Rinse thoroughly in cool running water. Towel dry your wig or hair pieces. Wig shampoo will not foam!
